FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}]," (async) processes entries during sleep Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extraction"}]," pulls structured facts into Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}]," removes low-importance entries per policy"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Read a:["$","$L7",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  START[Sleep Cycle Trigger] -->|every N seconds| WM2[Scan Working Memory]\n  WM2 -->|select| CAND[Candidates]\n  CAND -->|importance &gt; threshold| PROMOTE[Promote to Episodic]\n  CAND -->|extractable facts| EXTRACT[Extract to Semantic]\n  CAND -->|age &gt; limit| EVICT[Evict]\n  PROMOTE --> COMPRESS[AAAK Compress]\n  COMPRESS --> EM2[Episodic Memory]\n  EXTRACT --> TG2[Temporal Graph]\n  EVICT --> DEL[Remove]\n"}]
